prompt.name: Coherence Phase 23 — S23.3 间隔重复验证
prompt.sub_stage_name: 新增 test_phase23.py 验证 retention 和复习队列
prompt.role: 编写测试验证 retention 计算、复习队列检测、persistence 查询正确。
prompt.context:
=== 当前状态 === 无 Phase 23 测试。
=== 约束 === - 新建 tests/test_phase23.py - pytest 风格 - 不需要 DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
prompt.task:
── 新建 tests/test_phase23.py ──
```python """Phase 23: 间隔重复验证。""" import time from src.coach.flow import BKTEngine from src.coach.persistence import SessionPersistence
class TestRetention: def setup_method(self): self.bkt = BKTEngine()
def test_day0_equals_mastery(self): r = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, 0) assert r == 0.8
def test_retention_decays(self): r0 = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, 0) r7 = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, 7) r14 = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, 14) assert r0 > r7 > r14, f"retention should decay: {r0} > {r7} > {r14}"
def test_low_mastery_decays_fast(self): low = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.3, 3) high = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.9, 3) assert low < high
def test_boundary_zero_mastery(self): r = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.0, 7) assert r == 0.0
def test_boundary_negative_days(self): r = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, -1) assert r == 0.8
def test_half_life_parameter(self): r7 = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.8, 7, half_life=14) assert r7 > 0.5 # longer half-life = slower decay
def test_near_threshold(self): r = self.bkt.estimate_retention(0.85, 5) # 5 days at half_life=7: 0.85*0.5^(5/7) ≈ 0.52 assert r < 0.6, f"should be below review threshold, got {r}" ```
prompt.verification_method: ```bash cd D:/Claudedaoy/coherence python -m pytest tests/test_phase23.py -v python -m pytest tests/ -q ```
